title: VL+ CS Knifes Add-on
description: Changes the unique daggers in the Ventureland server to look like CS Knifes
body:
This VL+ add-on pack is made to give the unique daggers offered in the Ventureland server a new twist by getting insperation from the very apreciated knifes from the Counter Strike 2 game

Grab this pack if u wanna make those unique daggers stand out even more!

## note this pack uses OF CIT on Shears

if any1 want a vanilla working one let me know

![t6 venom skeleton dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472fbbc921951e474dc0ad2bb76761dc3626a71a_0.webp)
